flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Umpqua Community College fell 43% between 2006 and 2009 (22.9% → 13.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Umpqua Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.3k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Umpqua Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Umpqua Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (53.4% → 66.8%).
